subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Be content with thy Lord and detach thyself from whatsoever hath been created in the dust, for verily the dust and all that proceedeth therefrom shall pass away [3.5s]... ...Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I beg of Thee, by the Lights of Thy Beauty, the Exalted, the Supreme
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمد فاکف بربک و کن مستغنیا عما خلق فی التراب لان التراب و ما یحدث منه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God
